channel.title: Posts on Clayton T Hickey
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Clayton T Hickey

item.title: Welcome to My Blog
item.description:
Welcome!

This is my first post using the Hugo Terminal theme. The theme is minimal, retro, and perfect for a personal blog.

Features

  • 🎨 Clean, minimal design
  • ⚡ Fast and lightweight
  • 🌙 Customizable color schemes
  • 📱 Fully responsive

Feel free to add more content and customize this site to make it your own!
